text:
Created attachment 168187
dmesg

Hardware
2012 Macbook Air (Sandybridge)

Brightness is set to 0 when loading i915kms from console with kldload.
Blindly (or via ssh) typing intel_backlight 80 restores brightness.

Setting hw.acpi.video.lcd0.fullpower = some value in loader.conf does not help.
